thoughts_testsintauthprotectedroutesints.content: The test file passed all 15 tests but had 13 lint errors, causing FAIL verification — always run lint checks before marking a stage done.

thoughts_srcauthauthservice_447831942759.content: `as any` on mockPayload bypasses type checking in stubs — prefer explicit interface types for mock objects to catch contract mismatches early.

facts_test_planning_4478320882022.content: Co-located unit test (src/auth/withAuth.test.ts) was planned but never created — track sub-deliverables explicitly to avoid incomplete implementations.

facts_ci_review_4478322485626.content: Pre-existing typecheck errors in api.int.spec.ts surfaced during this stage — unrelated failures can block review even when your changeset is correct.

facts_testsint_5669265974067.content: New integration test files must pass linting before the task is considered complete — lint errors count as failures in review.

facts_auth_5669267610562.content: When a unit test file is planned (e.g. withAuth.test.ts) but not created, the task is not done even if integration tests pass.

thoughts_typecheck_5669269176353.content: Pre-existing typecheck errors in other files can cause a task to fail review even if the new code is correct.

conventions_testsint_5669270530318.content: Integration test files live under tests/int/ and must co-exist with any planned unit tests in src/ to be considered complete.

thoughts_testsintapiintspects_5669272252.content: Failing tests in tests/int/api.int.spec.ts that appear unrelated still cause review FAIL if the task modified files in the same directory.

thoughts_srcauth_5892806891787.content: Error message strings must match exactly — a trailing period difference ('User not found.' vs 'User not found') causes assertion failures.

thoughts_srcauth_5892808405190.content: HTTP status codes must match the actual source — 403 returned for missing roles but tests asserted 401.

facts_srcauth_5892810367063.content: When writing tests for existing HOCs, assert on the actual source code behavior (e.g., check createError calls in auth-service.ts) rather than inferring expected values.

conventions_srcauthwithauthts_5892812423.content: withAuth returns 403 (Forbidden) for insufficient roles, not 401 (Unauthorized) — use 403 for role/permission checks.

thoughts_srcauthwithauthtestts_643875057.content: When mocking `@/getPayload`, test assertions for error messages and HTTP status codes must match the actual response strings/codes in the source exactly—test failures here reveal real mismatches, not

conventions_testing_6438751941772.content: Auth HOC tests are split into a unit file (`src/auth/withAuth.test.ts`) and an integration file (`tests/int/auth-protected-routes.int.spec.ts`).

facts_testing_6438753526660.content: Error message assertions in tests (e.g., `'No token provided'`) must exactly match the string returned by the HOC; discrepancies are caught as test failures indicating source/test drift.

thoughts_srcauthwithauthts_6687073086559.content: withAuth catch block uses `authContext.status ?? 401`, silently coercing any thrown status to 401 even when the underlying service threw a different code.

facts_auth_testing_6687075081855.content: Complete auth flow coverage requires both unit tests (HOC 401/403/200 behavior, role inheritance, optional token mode) and integration tests (register→login→protected route→refresh→logout).

conventions_auth_testing_6687076620355.content: Use `makeAuthenticatedContext()` helper to create user+tokens+sessions for test context, consistent across all auth test files.

conventions_auth_testing_6687078293847.content: Use `vi.mock('@/getPayload')` to mock Payload instance for AuthService unit tests.

facts_auth_testing_6687080151144.content: Integration tests under `tests/int/` (not `src/`) for end-to-end auth flow; unit tests under `src/auth/` next to the module they test.
